candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue figure with full amounts populated; best representation of total revenues/sales.
Alternative revenue label but appears with no values in preview; kept as secondary fallback in case used in other years.
Expense item, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Pretax profit, not revenue; exclude for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Total Comprehensive Income attributable to Minority Interest
candidates.why: Equity flow, not revenue; exclude for REVT.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Component of equity, not revenue; exclude.

variables.notes: Selected main revenue line 'Revenues' with 'Operating Revenue' as a lower-priority historical fallback.

candidates.why: Inventory change is often part of cost of sales calculation but is an adjustment rather than the main COGS line; prefer explicit 'Cost of goods sold'.
Explicit cost of goods sold line; best match for COGS.
Overhead/SG&A-type operating expenses, not direct COGS.
Specific exploration costs, not general COGS.
Other exploration costs; not core COGS.
Net operating result, not a pure COGS line.
Financing, not COGS.
Restoration/retirement accretion; not standard COGS.
Rental expense, not COGS.
Same as other accretion; not core COGS.
Staff overhead; more SG&A than COGS in this context.

candidates.row_label: Gain on sale of assets (operating/administrative expenses)
candidates.why: Gain/adjustment, not cost of sales.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not income statement COGS.
Asset side; not period COGS.
Liability; not COGS.
Liability; not COGS.

variables.notes: Used explicit 'Cost of goods sold' line as COGS; other items like 'Changes in Inventory' are adjustments, not the main COGS measure.

candidates.why: Broad operating overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A component.
Explicit selling and administrative expenses; classic SG&A component.
Direct SG&A label; although values look empty in preview, should be included as an SG&A row.
Share-based compensation typically included in SG&A; treat as SG&A component.

candidates.row_label: Gain on sale of assets (operating/administrative expenses)
candidates.why: Gain/offset within operating/admin expenses; not a core recurring SG&A cost, so excluded from components list.

variables.notes: Included explicit SG&A line plus main overhead buckets and share-based payments as SG&A components, avoiding any totals or balancing items.

candidates.why: Explicit total R&D expense line; best match for XRD.

variables.notes: Clear standalone R&D expense line used for XRD.

candidates.why: Interest income, opposite sign of interest expense; not used for XINT which should reflect expense.
Generic interest expense label but appears unused; superseded by more detailed lines; could be backup but better to prioritize populated specific expense lines.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses and other financial expenses
candidates.why: Aggregated interest and other financial expenses; good candidate if the pure 'Interest Expense' line is missing in some years.
Interest on lease liabilities; component of total interest expense; good fallback for years where only lease interest is reported separately.
Core interest expense line with populated values; primary choice for XINT.
Alternative aggregated interest expense label; appears empty but can be a historical fallback.
Profit attribution, not interest; exclude.
Same as above; not interest.
Capitalized borrowing costs, not period interest expense line for P&L; exclude for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease interest disclosure; useful fallback if main interest expense missing.
Balance sheet asset; not an interest expense line.
Equity component; not interest.
Equity component; not interest.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses and other financial expenses
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided a priority list of interest expense labels, preferring the core 'Interest Expense' line, then broader or component expense lines as fallbacks. Income and equity items were excluded.

candidates.row_label: Net income/(loss) from equity accounted investments
candidates.why: Income statement item, not an equity balance; exclude for BE.

candidates.row_label: Attributable to equity holders of the company
candidates.why: Income attribution, not the equity stock; not suitable as BE.

candidates.row_label: Share of OCI from equity accounted investments
candidates.why: OCI share, not total equity; exclude.

candidates.row_label: Attributable to the equity holders of the company
candidates.why: Same as above; income flow, not equity balance.
Profits from equity-accounted investments, not equity balance.
Non-current asset; not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Payables to equity accounted companies and other related parties
candidates.why: Liability; not equity.
Equity attributable to shareholders (owners) excluding non-controlling interests; ideal for BE.
Component of equity movement, not the full equity balance.
Includes non-controlling interests; only used if owner equity line not available. Here, 'Shareholders equity' is available and preferred.

variables.notes: Used 'Shareholders equity' as equity attributable to owners, excluding non-controlling interests, consistent with BE definition.

candidates.why: Income attribution to NCI; useful but denominator should use balance sheet minority equity if available.
Same income attribution; again, we prefer balance sheet minority equity for MIB.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests in equity; primary choice for MIB.
Alternative label for the same minority equity; good fallback.

candidates.row_label: Total Comprehensive Income attributable to Minority Interest
candidates.why: Comprehensive income flow, not equity stock; exclude for MIB denominator.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to balance sheet minority equity lines, providing both 'Non-controlling interests' and 'Minority Interest' as a priority list to cover label changes over time.
